_comment: Opt-in list of accounts to COMMENT under (not just retweet) -- the one deliberate exception to the 'never auto-reply under other accounts' rule, so start small. 'user_id' is optional: leave it blank and it auto-resolves from 'handle' on first use (one read call, then cached), or paste the numeric ID yourself to skip that lookup. An entry with enabled=false does nothing at all. 'times_per_day' is a hard per-account cap. Watch reply quality for a while before adding more accounts.
